description:
Overviews:
SUITABLE For SINGLE & DOUBLE HAMMOCK: It can support up to 500 pounds, enough room for fitting 2 people comfortably, and give you more room to stretch out, nap or snuggle someone.
CAMPING & HIKING HAMMOCK: The lightweight camping Parachute is made of new 210T nylon, soft and breathable, skin-friendly, comfortable to lay down, easy to be cleaned and dry quickly after being wet.
ADJUSTABLE HEAVY DUTY TREE STRAPS: It can be folded into the attached sack, portable to carry and fits into a backpack. perfect for camping, travel, hiking, and sleeping. Attaching the hammock to anything sturdy, like trees, the upgraded sturdy hammock set makes it stronger to prevent snagging or ripping straps easily.
EASY INSTALLATION AND MULTIPLE USES: Tree straps & carabiners are included, making setup a breeze. No need to tie any knots. The hammock Hanging Ropes are 2M long and come with two carabiners


Specifications:

Hammock surface material: 210t nylon spinning
Maximum load: 300 (kg)
Weight: 800 (g)
Product size: 300*200cm
Packing size: 26*22*13cm


Package Content:

Hammock*1 Button*2 Strap*2
